description_long: This object is a cylindrical roll, predominantly white, with a slightly textured surface and a visible hollow core at each end. Both sides of the roll display a prominent red cross within a diamond outline, accompanied by warning text and military-style labeling, suggesting it is a medical supply, likely a large bandage or gauze roll. The surface appears to be made of a fibrous, soft material, possibly cotton or a synthetic blend, and the roll is tightly wound with a flat edge resting on the ground. The red cross and warning text are printed directly onto the outer layer, giving it a utilitarian, official look. The roll is substantial in size, likely intended for emergency or field use, and the overall design is functional with minimal decorative elements. No individual adhesive strips or perforations are visible, and the object appears to be unwrapped and ready for use.
description: A large, white cylindrical medical roll with a red cross and warning text, made of soft, fibrous material. The roll is hollow at both ends and features a utilitarian, official design.
description_view_0: End-on view showing the hollow core and tightly wound layers of the white roll.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the red cross emblem and warning text on the flat surface.
description_view_2: Opposite end-on view, similar to view 0, showing the hollow core and roll layers.
description_view_3: Full side view with the red cross emblem and detailed warning text clearly visible.
attribute_packaging_design: The object is a cylindrical roll with a white surface, featuring a red cross inside a diamond outline and red warning text printed on the side. The design is minimal and utilitarian, with military-style labeling and no decorative elements. The roll is unwrapped, and the surface appears slightly textured.
